A clear, one-line description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce
1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected
What you expected to happen.

## Actual
What actually happened. Include stdout/stderr verbatim, inside a code fence.

## Environment

- OS / arch:
- Compiler used to build (if from source):
- Inputs (binary architecture, libc version) if relevant:

## Minimal repro
If a binary or input file is needed, attach it here or link to it (must be
public). Do NOT attach challenge binaries you do not have permission to share.
